<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="es">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>PDV Manager</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.css"/>
<script src="https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.js"></script>
<script src="https://accounts.google.com/gsi/client" async defer></script>
<style>
:root {
  --bg:#0E0F12; --surface:#16181D; --surface2:#1E2028; --border:#2A2D36;
  --accent:#FFC300; --text:#F0F0F0; --muted:#6B7280;
  --green:#22C55E; --red:#EF4444;
  --dis:#E5222A; --far:#00B8A2; --spo:#1A6FA8;
}
*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;}
body{background:var(--bg);color:var(--text);font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;font-size:14px;height:100vh;overflow:hidden;}
input,select,button,textarea{font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;}

/* LAYOUT */
.app{display:flex;height:100vh;}
.sidebar{width:64px;background:var(--surface);border-right:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;padding:12px 0;gap:4px;flex-shrink:0;z-index:10;}
.slogo{width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:9px;background:var(--accent);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:18px;margin-bottom:12px;}
.nav-btn{width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:9px;border:none;background:transparent;color:var(--muted);cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:16px;transition:.15s;position:relative;}
.nav-btn:hover{background:var(--surface2);color:var(--text);}
.nav-btn.active{background:var(--accent);color:#000;}
.tip{position:absolute;left:50px;background:#1E2028;color:var(--text);font-size:11px;padding:4px 9px;border-radius:6px;white-space:nowrap;opacity:0;pointer-events:none;transition:.1s;border:1px solid var(--border);z-index:200;}
.nav-btn:hover .tip{opacity:1;}
.sdiv{width:32px;height:1px;background:var(--border);margin:4px 0;}

.main{flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;overflow:hidden;}
.topbar{height:56px;background:var(--surface);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;padding:0 16px;gap:10px;flex-shrink:0;}
.topbar-title{font-size:15px;font-weight:600;flex:1;}
.status-dot{width:7px;height:7px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--muted);flex-shrink:0;}
.status-dot.ok{background:var(--green);}
.status-dot.err{background:var(--red);}
.status-dot.load{background:var(--accent);animation:pulse 1s infinite;}
@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:1}50%{opacity:.3}}
#status-txt{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);}

/* BU PILLS */
.bu-pill{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;padding:4px 10px;border-radius:20px;border:1.5px solid var(--border);background:var(--surface2);cursor:pointer;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:var(--muted);transition:.15s;white-space:nowrap;}
.bu-pill:hover{border-color:var(--muted);}
.bu-pill.a-all{border-color:var(--accent);color:var(--accent);background:rgba(255,195,0,.08);}
.bu-pill.a-dis{border-color:var(--dis);color:var(--dis);background:rgba(229,34,42,.08);}
.bu-pill.a-far{border-color:var(--far);color:var(--far);background:rgba(0,184,162,.08);}
.bu-pill.a-spo{border-color:var(--spo);color:var(--spo);background:rgba(26,111,168,.08);}
.bu-logo-img{height:14px;width:auto;max-width:120px;object-fit:contain;display:block;}
.vsep{width:1px;height:24px;background:var(--border);}

/* SUBBAR */
.subbar{height:48px;background:var(--surface);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;padding:0 16px;gap:8px;flex-shrink:0;}
.sf-btn{padding:4px 12px;border-radius:16px;border:1.5px solid var(--border);background:transparent;color:var(--muted);font-size:11px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;transition:.15s;}
.sf-btn:hover{color:var(--text);}
.sf-btn.active{border-color:var(--text);color:var(--text);background:var(--surface2);}
.search-box{flex:1;max-width:280px;position:relative;margin-left:auto;}
.search-box input{width:100%;background:var(--surface2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:6px 10px 6px 30px;color:var(--text);font-size:12px;outline:none;}
.search-box input:focus{border-color:var(--accent);}
.search-box::before{content:"🔍";position:absolute;left:9px;top:6px;font-size:12px;pointer-events:none;}
.stat-chip{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);white-space:nowrap;padding:0 8px;}
.stat-chip strong{color:var(--text);}
.add-btn{padding:6px 14px;border-radius:8px;border:none;background:var(--accent);color:#000;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;white-space:nowrap;}
.add-btn:hover{opacity:.9;}
.icon-btn{padding:6px 10px;border-radius:8px;border:1.5px solid var(--border);background:transparent;color:var(--muted);font-size:12px;cursor:pointer;transition:.15s;white-space:nowrap;}
.icon-btn:hover{border-color:var(--muted);color:var(--text);}
.import-confirm{position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,.7);z-index:200;display:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center;}
.import-confirm.open{display:flex;}
.import-box{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;padding:24px;max-width:340px;width:90%;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:14px;}
.import-box h3{font-size:15px;font-weight:600;}
.import-box p{font-size:13px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.5;}
.import-actions{display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:flex-end;}

/* VIEWS */
.view{flex:1;overflow:hidden;display:none;}
.view.active{display:flex;flex-direction:column;}
#view-map{position:relative;}
#map{width:100%;height:100%;}
#view-list{overflow-y:auto;}
#view-sheets{overflow-y:auto;padding:20px;}

/* GRID */
.grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(260px,1fr));gap:14px;padding:16px;}
.card{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;overflow:hidden;cursor:pointer;transition:.15s;}
.card:hover{border-color:var(--muted);transform:translateY(-1px);}
.card.off{opacity:.5;}
.card-banner{height:90px;background:var(--surface2);position:relative;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;overflow:hidden;}
.card-banner .bimg{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;}
.bu-stripe{position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:3px;}
.card-logo{position:absolute;bottom:-16px;left:14px;width:34px;height:34px;border-radius:8px;background:var(--surface);border:2px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:16px;overflow:hidden;}
.card-logo img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;}
.card-body{padding:22px 14px 10px;}
.card-name{font-size:13px;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:2px;}
.card-sub{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:6px;}
.card-addr{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);display:flex;gap:4px;align-items:flex-start;margin-bottom:7px;}
.card-brands{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:3px;}
.btag{font-size:10px;padding:2px 7px;border-radius:10px;background:var(--surface2);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--muted);}
.card-foot{padding:8px 14px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;}
.sbadge{font-size:11px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;font-weight:500;}
.sbadge.on{color:var(--green);}
.sbadge.off{color:var(--muted);}
.sdot{width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;background:currentColor;}
.bu-label{font-size:10px;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:10px;font-weight:600;}
.empty{display:none;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:10px;padding:60px;color:var(--muted);font-size:14px;}
.empty-icon{font-size:40px;opacity:.3;}

/* MAP */
.mkr{width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:50%;border:2px solid;background:var(--surface);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:14px;cursor:pointer;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.5);}
.mkr.off{filter:grayscale(1);opacity:.5;}
.mpop{font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;font-size:12px;color:#111;min-width:200px;}
.mpop-name{font-weight:700;font-size:13px;margin-bottom:2px;}
.mpop-sub{font-size:10px;color:#666;margin-bottom:4px;}
.mpop-row{display:flex;gap:5px;margin-bottom:3px;align-items:flex-start;}
.mpop-bu{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;font-size:10px;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:10px;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:6px;}
.mpop-btn{width:100%;margin-top:7px;padding:6px;border:none;border-radius:6px;background:#111;color:#fff;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;}
.mbadge{display:inline-block;font-size:10px;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:10px;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:4px;}
.mbadge.on{background:#dcfce7;color:#166534;}
.mbadge.off{background:#f3f4f6;color:#6b7280;}

/* PANEL */
.overlay{position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,.5);z-index:100;display:none;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:flex-end;}
.overlay.open{display:flex;}
.panel{width:420px;height:100vh;background:var(--surface);border-left:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;flex-direction:column;overflow:hidden;animation:slideIn .2s ease;}
@keyframes slideIn{from{transform:translateX(30px);opacity:0}to{transform:none;opacity:1}}
.panel-head{padding:16px 18px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;}
.panel-title{font-size:15px;font-weight:600;}
.panel-close{background:transparent;border:none;color:var(--muted);font-size:18px;cursor:pointer;padding:2px 6px;border-radius:6px;}
.panel-close:hover{background:var(--surface2);color:var(--text);}
.panel-body{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:16px 18px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:14px;}
.panel-body::-webkit-scrollbar{width:4px;}
.panel-body::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:var(--border);border-radius:4px;}
.fgroup{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:5px;}
.frow{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:10px;}
label{font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:var(--muted);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px;}
input[type=text],input[type=number],select{background:var(--surface2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:8px 10px;color:var(--text);font-size:13px;outline:none;width:100%;}
input:focus,select:focus{border-color:var(--accent);}
select option{background:var(--surface2);}
.logo-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;}
.logo-prev{width:46px;height:46px;border-radius:9px;background:var(--surface2);border:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:22px;overflow:hidden;flex-shrink:0;}
.file-btn{padding:7px 12px;border-radius:8px;border:1.5px solid var(--border);background:transparent;color:var(--text);font-size:12px;cursor:pointer;}
.file-btn:hover{border-color:var(--muted);}
.brands-wrap{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:5px;background:var(--surface2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:7px;min-height:38px;align-items:center;}
.brands-wrap:focus-within{border-color:var(--accent);}
.bchip{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:3px;background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:2px 6px 2px 8px;font-size:11px;}
.bchip button{background:none;border:none;color:var(--muted);cursor:pointer;font-size:11px;padding:0 2px;}
.bchip button:hover{color:var(--red);}
#brand-inp{background:transparent;border:none;outline:none;color:var(--text);font-size:12px;min-width:80px;padding:2px 4px;}
.photos-wrap{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:7px;}
.photo-thumb{width:60px;height:60px;border-radius:8px;object-fit:cover;border:1px solid var(--border);}
.photo-del{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:3px;cursor:pointer;}
.photo-del span{font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);}
.tog-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;}
.tog{width:40px;height:22px;border-radius:11px;background:var(--surface2);border:2px solid var(--border);position:relative;cursor:pointer;transition:.2s;}
.tog.on{background:var(--green);border-color:var(--green);}
.tog::after{content:"";position:absolute;width:14px;height:14px;background:#fff;border-radius:50%;top:2px;left:2px;transition:.2s;}
.tog.on::after{left:20px;}
#tog-label{font-size:13px;font-weight:500;}
.panel-foot{padding:14px 18px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;gap:8px;}
.btn-save{flex:1;padding:9px;border-radius:8px;border:none;background:var(--accent);color:#000;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;}
.btn-save:hover{opacity:.9;}
.btn-del{padding:9px 14px;border-radius:8px;border:1.5px solid var(--border);background:transparent;color:var(--muted);font-size:13px;cursor:pointer;}
.btn-del:hover{border-color:var(--red);color:var(--red);}
.btn-cancel{padding:9px 14px;border-radius:8px;border:1.5px solid var(--border);background:transparent;color:var(--muted);font-size:13px;cursor:pointer;}

/* SHEETS */
.sheets-wrap{max-width:700px;margin:0 auto;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:20px;}
.sh-head{font-size:18px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:4px;}
.sh-sub{font-size:13px;color:var(--muted);}
.sh-card{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;overflow:hidden;}
.sh-card-head{padding:14px 16px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;}
.bu-dot{width:10px;height:10px;border-radius:50%;flex-shrink:0;}
.sh-card-title{font-size:14px;font-weight:600;}
.sh-card-body{padding:14px 16px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px;}
.url-bar{display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:center;}
.url-bar input{flex:1;background:var(--surface2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:8px 10px;color:var(--text);font-size:12px;outline:none;}
.url-bar input:focus{border-color:var(--accent);}
.btn-connect{padding:8px 14px;border-radius:8px;border:none;color:white;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;white-space:nowrap;}
.btn-connect:hover{opacity:.85;}
.btn-connect:disabled{opacity:.5;cursor:not-allowed;}
.sh-hint{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.6;}
.sh-hint strong{color:var(--text);}
.sh-hint code{background:var(--surface2);padding:1px 5px;border-radius:4px;font-family:monospace;font-size:10px;}
.prev-bar{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:10px 14px;background:var(--surface2);border-radius:8px;}
.prev-cnt{font-size:13px;font-weight:600;}
.prev-actions{display:flex;gap:6px;}
.btn-confirm{padding:6px 14px;border-radius:7px;border:none;background:var(--green);color:#000;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;}
.btn-cancel2{padding:6px 12px;border-radius:7px;border:1px solid var(--border);background:transparent;color:var(--muted);font-size:12px;cursor:pointer;}
.table-wrap{overflow-x:auto;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;}
table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:12px;}
th{background:var(--surface2);padding:8px 12px;text-align:left;font-weight:600;color:var(--muted);font-size:11px;text-transform:uppercase;}
td{padding:8px 12px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);}
.result-ok{padding:10px 14px;background:rgba(34,197,94,.1);border:1px solid rgba(34,197,94,.3);border-radius:8px;font-size:12px;color:var(--green);}
.result-err{padding:10px 14px;background:rgba(239,68,68,.1);border:1px solid rgba(239,68,68,.3);border-radius:8px;font-size:12px;color:var(--red);}

/* GEOCODE */
.geo-status{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);min-height:16px;}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="app">

<!-- SIDEBAR -->
<div class="sidebar">
  <div class="slogo">📍</div>
  <button class="nav-btn active" onclick="showView('map',this)">🗺️<span class="tip">Mapa</span></button>
  <button class="nav-btn" onclick="showView('list',this)">☰<span class="tip">Lista</span></button>
  <div class="sdiv"></div>
  <button class="nav-btn" onclick="showView('sheets',this)">📊<span class="tip">Google Sheets</span></button>
</div>

<!-- MAIN -->
<div class="main">

  <!-- TOPBAR -->
  <div class="topbar">
    <span class="topbar-title">PDV Manager</span>
    <div class="bu-pill a-all" id="pill-all" onclick="setBU('all',this)">Todos</div>
    <div class="bu-pill" id="pill-dis" onclick="setBU('distrade',this)"><img src="data:image/png;base64," class="bu-logo-img" alt="Distrade"></div>
    <div class="bu-pill" id="pill-far" onclick="setBU('farmaprix',this)"><img src="data:image/png;base64," class="bu-logo-img" alt="Farmaprix"></div>
    <div class="bu-pill" id="pill-spo" onclick="setBU('sportive',this)"><img src="data:image/png;base64," class="bu-logo-img" alt="Sportive"></div>
    <div class="vsep"></div>
    <div class="status-dot" id="status-dot"></div>
    <span id="status-txt">Listo</span>
  </div>

  <!-- SUBBAR -->
  <div class="subbar">
    <button class="sf-btn active" onclick="setStatus('all',this)">Todos</button>
    <button class="sf-btn" onclick="setStatus('active',this)">Activos</button>
    <button class="sf-btn" onclick="setStatus('inactive',this)">Inactivos</button>
    <span class="stat-chip"><strong id="sc-shown">0</strong> / <strong id="sc-total">0</strong> PDVs</span>
    <div class="search-box"><input type="text" id="searchInp" placeholder="Buscar PDV..." oninput="applyFilters()"></div>
    <button class="icon-btn" onclick="exportBackup()" title="Exportar backup">⬇ Exportar</button>
    <label class="icon-btn" style="cursor:pointer" title="Importar backup">⬆ Importar<input type="file" accept=".json" style="display:none" onchange="importBackup(event)"></label>
    <button class="add-btn" onclick="openPanel(null)">+ Nuevo PDV</button>
  </div>

  <!-- MAP VIEW -->
  <div class="view active" id="view-map">
    <div id="map"></div>
  </div>

  <!-- LIST VIEW -->
  <div class="view" id="view-list">
    <div class="grid" id="grid"></div>
    <div class="empty" id="empty"><div class="empty-icon">🔍</div><span>No hay PDVs que coincidan</span></div>
  </div>

  <!-- SHEETS VIEW -->
  <div class="view" id="view-sheets">
    <div class="sheets-wrap">
      <div>
        <div class="sh-head">📊 Importar desde Google Sheets</div>
        <div class="sh-sub">Pegá la URL del Sheet publicado como CSV y sincronizá tus PDVs.</div>
      </div>

      <!-- GOOGLE DRIVE SYNC -->
      <div class="sh-card" style="border:1.5px solid #4285F4">
        <div class="sh-card-head"><span style="font-size:18px">☁️</span><span class="sh-card-title" style="color:#4285F4">Sincronización con Google Drive</span></div>
        <div class="sh-card-body">
          <div id="drive-info" style="font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:10px">Conectá tu cuenta para sincronizar entre dispositivos</div>
          <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap">
            <button class="btn-connect" style="background:#4285F4;color:#fff" id="drive-login-btn" onclick="driveLogin()">🔗 Conectar con Google Drive</button>
            <button class="btn-connect" style="background:var(--surface2);border:1px solid var(--border)" onclick="driveLoad()">🔄 Cargar desde Drive</button>
            <button class="btn-connect" style="background:var(--surface2);border:1px solid var(--border)" onclick="driveSave(true)">💾 Guardar en Drive</button>
          </div>
          <div id="drive-result"></div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- FORMAT HINT -->
      <div class="sh-hint" style="background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:14px 16px;">
        <strong>Columnas que lee la app (cualquier orden, no distingue mayúsculas):</strong><br><br>
        <code>RAZON SOCIAL</code> &nbsp;— obligatoria<br>
        <code>NOMBRE DE FANTASIA</code> · <code>SUCURSALES</code> · <code>LOCALIDAD</code> · <code>PROVINCIA</code> · <code>ESTADO</code> · <code>VENDEDOR</code> · <code>CANAL</code> · <code>lat</code> · <code>lng</code> &nbsp;— opcionales<br><br>
        <strong>Cómo publicar:</strong> Archivo → Publicar en la web → Hoja → Valores separados por comas (CSV) → Publicar
      </div>

      <!-- DISTRADE -->
      <div class="sh-card">
        <div class="sh-card-head"><div class="bu-dot" style="background:var(--dis)"></div><span class="sh-card-title">Distrade</span></div>
        <div class="sh-card-body">
          <div class="url-bar">
            <input type="text" id="url-dis" placeholder="URL Google Sheets — Distrade...">
            <button class="btn-connect" style="background:var(--dis)" id="btn-dis" onclick="fetchBU('distrade')">Importar</button>
          </div>
          <div id="prev-dis" style="display:none;flex-direction:column;gap:10px">
            <div class="prev-bar"><span class="prev-cnt" id="pc-dis">0 filas</span><div class="prev-actions"><button class="btn-cancel2" onclick="cancelBU('distrade')">Cancelar</button><button class="btn-confirm" onclick="confirmBU('distrade')">✅ Aplicar</button></div></div>
            <div class="table-wrap"><div id="ptable-dis"></div></div>
          </div>
          <div id="result-dis"></div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- FARMAPRIX -->
      <div class="sh-card">
        <div class="sh-card-head"><div class="bu-dot" style="background:var(--far)"></div><span class="sh-card-title">Farmaprix</span></div>
        <div class="sh-card-body">
          <div class="url-bar">
            <input type="text" id="url-far" placeholder="URL Google Sheets — Farmaprix...">
            <button class="btn-connect" style="background:var(--far)" id="btn-far" onclick="fetchBU('farmaprix')">Importar</button>
          </div>
          <div id="prev-far" style="display:none;flex-direction:column;gap:10px">
            <div class="prev-bar"><span class="prev-cnt" id="pc-far">0 filas</span><div class="prev-actions"><button class="btn-cancel2" onclick="cancelBU('farmaprix')">Cancelar</button><button class="btn-confirm" onclick="confirmBU('farmaprix')">✅ Aplicar</button></div></div>
            <div class="table-wrap"><div id="ptable-far"></div></div>
          </div>
          <div id="result-far"></div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- SPORTIVE -->
      <div class="sh-card">
        <div class="sh-card-head"><div class="bu-dot" style="background:var(--spo)"></div><span class="sh-card-title">Sportive</span></div>
        <div class="sh-card-body">
          <div class="url-bar">
            <input type="text" id="url-spo" placeholder="URL Google Sheets — Sportive...">
            <button class="btn-connect" style="background:var(--spo)" id="btn-spo" onclick="fetchBU('sportive')">Importar</button>
          </div>
          <div id="prev-spo" style="display:none;flex-direction:column;gap:10px">
            <div class="prev-bar"><span class="prev-cnt" id="pc-spo">0 filas</span><div class="prev-actions"><button class="btn-cancel2" onclick="cancelBU('sportive')">Cancelar</button><button class="btn-confirm" onclick="confirmBU('sportive')">✅ Aplicar</button></div></div>
            <div class="table-wrap"><div id="ptable-spo"></div></div>
          </div>
          <div id="result-spo"></div>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

</div><!-- /main -->
</div><!-- /app -->

<!-- PANEL OVERLAY -->
<div class="overlay" id="overlay" onclick="overlayClick(event)">
  <div class="panel" onclick="event.stopPropagation()">
    <div class="panel-head">
      <span class="panel-title" id="panel-title">Nuevo PDV</span>
      <button class="panel-close" onclick="closePanel()">✕</button>
    </div>
    <div class="panel-body">
      <div class="fgroup">
        <label>Unidad de Negocio</label>
        <select id="f-bu">
          <option value="distrade">Distrade</option>
          <option value="farmaprix">Farmaprix</option>
          <option value="sportive">Sportive</option>
        </select>
      </div>
      <div class="fgroup">
        <label>Razón Social *</label>
        <input type="text" id="f-razon" placeholder="Ej: Papelería Sur SRL">
      </div>
      <div class="fgroup">
        <label>Nombre Fantasía</label>
        <input type="text" id="f-fantasia" placeholder="Ej: PaperSur">
      </div>
      <div class="fgroup">
        <label>Dirección</label>
        <input type="text" id="f-addr" placeholder="Calle 123, Ciudad" oninput="scheduleGeo()">
        <div class="geo-status" id="geo-status"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="frow">
        <div class="fgroup"><label>Latitud</label><input type="number" id="f-lat" placeholder="-34.6037" step="any"></div>
        <div class="fgroup"><label>Longitud</label><input type="number" id="f-lng" placeholder="-58.3816" step="any"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="fgroup">
        <label>Logo</label>
        <div class="logo-row">
          <div class="logo-prev" id="logo-prev">🏪</div>
          <label class="file-btn" style="cursor:pointer">Subir imagen<input type="file" accept="image/*" style="display:none" onchange="handleLogo(event)"></label>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="fgroup">
        <label>Fotos</label>
        <div class="photos-wrap" id="photos-wrap"></div>
        <label class="file-btn" style="cursor:pointer;margin-top:6px">+ Agregar foto<input type="file" accept="image/*" multiple style="display:none" onchange="handlePhotos(event)"></label>
      </div>
      <div class="frow">
        <div class="fgroup"><label>Vendedor</label><input type="text" id="f-vendedor" placeholder="Ej: Pablo Liberato"></div>
        <div class="fgroup"><label>Canal</label><input type="text" id="f-canal" placeholder="Ej: Sporting Good"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="fgroup">
        <label>Marcas (Enter para agregar)</label>
        <div class="brands-wrap" id="brands-wrap"><input type="text" id="brand-inp" placeholder="Ej: BIC" onkeydown="addBrand(event)"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="fgroup">
        <label>Estado</label>
        <div class="tog-row">
          <div class="tog on" id="tog" onclick="toggleActive()"></div>
          <span id="tog-label">Activo</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="panel-foot">
      <button class="btn-cancel" onclick="closePanel()">Cancelar</button>
      <button class="btn-del" id="btn-del" onclick="deletePDV()" style="display:none">Eliminar</button>
      <button class="btn-save" onclick="savePDV()">Guardar</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
var BU_COLORS = {distrade:'#E5222A', farmaprix:'#00B8A2', sportive:'#1A6FA8'};
var BU_NAMES  = {distrade:'Distrade', farmaprix:'Farmaprix', sportive:'Sportive'};

var pdvs = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('pdvs2') || '[]');
var mapInst = null, mapMarkers = {}, editId = null;
var filterBU = 'all', filterStatus = 'all';
var brands = [], photos = [], logoData = null, geoTimer = null;
var pendingImport = {};

if (!pdvs.length) {
  pdvs = [
    {id:1,bu:'distrade',razon:'Distribuidora El Centro SRL',fantasia:'El Centro',address:'Av. Corrientes 1234, CABA',lat:-34.6037,lng:-58.3816,logo:'🏪',logoImg:null,photos:[],brands:['BIC','Stabilo'],active:true},
    {id:2,bu:'distrade',razon:'Papelería Norte SA',fantasia:'Norte',address:'Bv. Oroño 234, Rosario',lat:-32.9468,lng:-60.6393,logo:'📦',logoImg:null,photos:[],brands:['Faber-Castell'],active:true},
    {id:3,bu:'farmaprix',razon:'Farmacia Central SRL',fantasia:'Farma Central',address:'San Martín 456, Córdoba',lat:-31.4201,lng:-64.1888,logo:'💊',logoImg:null,photos:[],brands:['Pelikan'],active:true},
    {id:4,bu:'farmaprix',razon:'Farmaprix Mendoza SA',fantasia:'',address:'Av. San Martín 789, Mendoza',lat:-32.8895,lng:-68.8458,logo:'🏥',logoImg:null,photos:[],brands:[],active:false},
    {id:5,bu:'sportive',razon:'Deportes Sur SRL',fantasia:'SportSur',address:'Mitre 567, Tucumán',lat:-26.8241,lng:-65.2226,logo:'⚽',logoImg:null,photos:[],brands:['Nike','Adidas'],active:true},
    {id:6,bu:'sportive',razon:'SportCenter Neuquén SA',fantasia:'SportCenter',address:'Av. Argentina 1200, Neuquén',lat:-38.9516,lng:-68.0591,logo:'🏋️',logoImg:null,photos:[],brands:['Puma'],active:true}
  ];
  save();
}

// ── Google Drive Sync ──────────────────────────────────────
var GAPI_CLIENT_ID = '358223054148-qla2k0vld4c7m89l85q6r5k3k0qgpnm4.apps.googleusercontent.com';
var GAPI_SCOPE = 'https://www.googleapis.com/auth/drive.appdata';
var DRIVE_FILE_NAME = 'pdv-manager-data.json';
var driveFileId = localStorage.getItem('drive-file-id') || null;
var driveToken = null;
var driveSaveTimer = null;

function save() {
  localStorage.setItem('pdvs2', JSON.stringify(pdvs));
  updateStats();
  if (driveToken) {
    clearTimeout(driveSaveTimer);
    driveSaveTimer = setTimeout(function() { driveSave(false); }, 2000);
  }
}

// Iniciar login con Google
function driveLogin() {
  if (typeof google === 'undefined') {
    setSyncStatus('err', 'Cargando Google...');
    setTimeout(driveLogin, 1000);
    return;
  }
  var client = google.accounts.oauth2.initTokenClient({
    client_id: GAPI_CLIENT_ID,
    scope: GAPI_SCOPE,
    callback: function(resp) {
      if (resp.error) { setSyncStatus('err', 'Error: ' + resp.error); return; }
      driveToken = resp.access_token;
      localStorage.setItem('drive-token', driveToken);
      setSyncStatus('ok', 'Google Drive conectado ✓');
      setDriveUI(true);
      driveLoad();
    }
  });
  client.requestAccessToken();
}

function driveLogout() {
  driveToken = null;
  driveFileId = null;
  localStorage.removeItem('drive-token');
  localStorage.removeItem('drive-file-id');
  setDriveUI(false);
  setSyncStatus('ok', 'Desconectado');
}

function setDriveUI(connected) {
  var btn = document.getElementById('drive-login-btn');
  var info = document.getElementById('drive-info');
  if (connected) {
    btn.textContent = '🔓 Desconectar';
    btn.onclick = driveLogout;
    info.textContent = '✅ Conectado — los cambios se guardan automáticamente';
    info.style.color = 'var(--green)';
  } else {
    btn.textContent = '🔗 Conectar con Google Drive';
    btn.onclick = driveLogin;
    info.textContent = 'Conectá tu cuenta para sincronizar entre dispositivos';
    info.style.color = 'var(--muted)';
  }
}

// Guardar en Drive
function driveSave(notify) {
  if (!driveToken) { if (notify) driveShowResult('❌ Conectá Google Drive primero', 'err'); return; }
  var content = JSON.stringify({ pdvs: pdvs, saved: new Date().toISOString() });
  var doSave = function(fileId) {
    var url = fileId
      ? 'https://www.googleapis.com/upload/drive/v3/files/' + fileId + '?uploadType=media'
      : 'https://www.googleapis.com/upload/drive/v3/files?uploadType=multipart';
    var method = fileId ? 'PATCH' : 'POST';
    var body, headers = { 'Authorization': 'Bearer ' + driveToken };
    if (fileId) {
      body = content;
      headers['Content-Type'] = 'application/json';
    } else {
      var boundary = 'pdvboundary';
      var meta = JSON.stringify({ name: DRIVE_FILE_NAME, parents: ['appDataFolder'] });
      body = '--' + boundary + '\r\nContent-Type: application/json\r\n\r\n' + meta +
             '\r\n--' + boundary + '\r\nContent-Type: application/json\r\n\r\n' + content +
             '\r\n--' + boundary + '--';
      headers['Content-Type'] = 'multipart/related; boundary=' + boundary;
    }
    fetch(url, { method: method, headers: headers, body: body })
      .then(function(r) { return r.json(); })
      .then(function(d) {
        if (d.id) {
          driveFileId = d.id;
          localStorage.setItem('drive-file-id', driveFileId);
        }
        if (notify) driveShowResult('✅ Guardado en Drive · ' + new Date().toLocaleTimeString('es-AR'), 'ok');
        setSyncStatus('ok', 'Drive sync · ' + new Date().toLocaleTimeString('es-AR'));
      })
      .catch(function(e) {
        if (notify) driveShowResult('❌ Error al guardar: ' + e.message, 'err');
      });
  };

  if (driveFileId) { doSave(driveFileId); return; }
  // Buscar archivo existente
  fetch('https://www.googleapis.com/drive/v3/files?spaces=appDataFolder&q=name%3D%22' + DRIVE_FILE_NAME + '%22',
    { headers: { 'Authorization': 'Bearer ' + driveToken } })
    .then(function(r) { return r.json(); })
    .then(function(d) {
      if (d.files && d.files.length) { driveFileId = d.files[0].id; localStorage.setItem('drive-file-id', driveFileId); }
      doSave(driveFileId);
    })
    .catch(function() { doSave(null); });
}

// Cargar desde Drive
function driveLoad() {
  if (!driveToken) { driveShowResult('❌ Conectá Google Drive primero', 'err'); return; }
  setSyncStatus('load', 'Cargando desde Drive...');
  driveShowResult('🔄 Cargando...', 'ok');
  var findAndLoad = function() {
    fetch('https://www.googleapis.com/drive/v3/files?spaces=appDataFolder&q=name%3D%22' + DRIVE_FILE_NAME + '%22',
      { headers: { 'Authorization': 'Bearer ' + driveToken } })
      .then(function(r) { return r.json(); })
      .then(function(d) {
        if (!d.files || !d.files.length) {
          driveShowResult('ℹ️ No hay datos en Drive todavía. Guardá primero.', 'ok');
          setSyncStatus('ok', 'Drive vacío');
          return;
        }
        driveFileId = d.files[0].id;
        localStorage.setItem('drive-file-id', driveFileId);
        return fetch('https://www.googleapis.com/drive/v3/files/' + driveFileId + '?alt=media',
          { headers: { 'Authorization': 'Bearer ' + driveToken } });
      })
      .then(function(r) { return r && r.json(); })
      .then(function(data) {
        if (!data || !data.pdvs) return;
        pdvs = data.pdvs;
        localStorage.setItem('pdvs2', JSON.stringify(pdvs));
        renderList(); renderMarkers(); updateStats();
        driveShowResult('✅ ' + pdvs.length + ' PDVs cargados desde Drive · ' + new Date().toLocaleTimeString('es-AR'), 'ok');
        setSyncStatus('ok', 'Drive sync · ' + new Date().toLocaleTimeString('es-AR'));
      })
      .catch(function(e) {
        driveShowResult('❌ Error: ' + e.message, 'err');
        setSyncStatus('err', 'Drive error');
      });
  };
  findAndLoad();
}

function driveShowResult(msg, type) {
  var el = document.getElementById('drive-result');
  if (!el) return;
  el.innerHTML = '<div class="result-' + (type==='ok'?'ok':'err') + '">' + htmlEsc(msg) + '</div>';
}
// ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function htmlEsc(s) { return String(s||'').replace(/&/g,'&amp;').replace(/</g,'&lt;').replace(/>/g,'&gt;').replace(/"/g,'&quot;'); }

function filteredPDVs() {
  var q = (document.getElementById('searchInp').value||'').toLowerCase();
  return pdvs.filter(function(p) {
    if (filterBU !== 'all' && p.bu !== filterBU) return false;
    if (filterStatus === 'active' && !p.active) return false;
    if (filterStatus === 'inactive' && p.active) return false;
    if (q) { var h=(p.razon+' '+(p.fantasia||'')+' '+(p.address||'')).toLowerCase(); if(h.indexOf(q)<0) return false; }
    return true;
  });
}

function updateStats() {
  var f = filteredPDVs();
  document.getElementById('sc-shown').textContent = f.length;
  document.getElementById('sc-total').textContent = pdvs.length;
}

function applyFilters() { updateStats(); renderMarkers(); renderList(); }

function setBU(bu, el) {
  filterBU = bu;
  document.querySelectorAll('.bu-pill').forEach(function(p){ p.className='bu-pill'; });
  var cls = bu==='all'?'a-all':bu==='distrade'?'a-dis':bu==='farmaprix'?'a-far':'a-spo';
  el.className = 'bu-pill '+cls;
  applyFilters();
}

function setStatus(s, el) {
  filterStatus = s;
  document.querySelectorAll('.sf-btn').forEach(function(b){b.classList.remove('active');});
  el.classList.add('active');
  applyFilters();
}

function setStatus2(s, el) { setStatus(s, el); }

function showView(name, btn) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.view').forEach(function(v){v.classList.remove('active');});
  document.querySelectorAll('.nav-btn').forEach(function(b){b.classList.remove('active');});
  document.getElementById('view-'+name).classList.add('active');
  btn.classList.add('active');
  if (name==='list') renderList();
  if (name==='map') setTimeout(function(){ if(mapInst) mapInst.invalidateSize(); }, 100);
}

function setSyncStatus(state, msg) {
  var dot = document.getElementById('status-dot');
  dot.className = 'status-dot ' + (state||'');
  document.getElementById('status-txt').textContent = msg||'';
}

/* MAP */
function initMap() {
  mapInst = L.map('map', {center:[-38.4161,-63.6167], zoom:5});
  L.tileLayer('https://{s}.basemaps.cartocdn.com/dark_all/{z}/{x}/{y}{r}.png', {
    attribution:'© OpenStreetMap © CARTO', subdomains:'abcd', maxZoom:19
  }).addTo(mapInst);
  renderMarkers();
}

function renderMarkers() {
  if (!mapInst) return;
  Object.values(mapMarkers).forEach(function(m){ mapInst.removeLayer(m); });
  mapMarkers = {};
  filteredPDVs().forEach(function(pdv) {
    if (!pdv.lat || !pdv.lng) return;
    var color = BU_COLORS[pdv.bu]||'#FFC300';
    var div = document.createElement('div');
    div.className = 'mkr'+(pdv.active?'':' off');
    div.style.borderColor = color;
    if (pdv.logoImg) div.innerHTML = "<img src='"+pdv.logoImg+"' style='width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;border-radius:50%'>";
    else div.textContent = pdv.logo||'📍';
    var icon = L.divIcon({html:div.outerHTML, className:'', iconSize:[32,32], iconAnchor:[16,16]});
    var marker = L.marker([pdv.lat,pdv.lng],{icon:icon}).addTo(mapInst);
    var pop = "<div class='mpop'>"
      +"<div class='mpop-name'>"+htmlEsc(pdv.fantasia||pdv.razon)+"</div>"
      +(pdv.fantasia?"<div class='mpop-sub'>"+htmlEsc(pdv.razon)+"</div>":"")
      +"<div class='mpop-bu' style='background:rgba(0,0,0,.1);color:"+color+";border:1px solid "+color+"'>"+BU_NAMES[pdv.bu]+"</div>"
      +"<div class='mpop-row'><span>📍</span><span>"+htmlEsc(pdv.address||'')+"</span></div>"
      +(pdv.vendedor?"<div class='mpop-row'><span>👤</span><span>"+htmlEsc(pdv.vendedor)+"</span></div>":"")
      +(pdv.canal?"<div class='mpop-row'><span>📢</span><span>"+htmlEsc(pdv.canal)+"</span></div>":"")
      +(pdv.brands&&pdv.brands.length?"<div class='mpop-row'><span>🏷️</span><span>"+pdv.brands.slice(0,3).join(', ')+"</span></div>":"")
      +"<span class='mbadge "+(pdv.active?'on':'off')+"'>"+(pdv.active?'● Activo':'● Inactivo')+"</span>"
      +"<button class='mpop-btn' onclick='openPanel("+pdv.id+")'>✏️ Editar</button>"
      +"</div>";
    marker.bindPopup(pop, {maxWidth:250, className:'dark-popup'});
    mapMarkers[pdv.id] = marker;
  });
}

/* LIST */
function renderList() {
  var f = filteredPDVs();
  var grid = document.getElementById('grid');
  document.getElementById('empty').style.display = f.length?'none':'flex';
  if (!f.length) { grid.innerHTML=''; return; }
  grid.innerHTML = f.map(function(pdv) {
    var color = BU_COLORS[pdv.bu]||'#FFC300';
    var logoHtml = pdv.logoImg?"<img src='"+pdv.logoImg+"' style='width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;'>":("<span style='font-size:18px'>"+pdv.logo+"</span>");
    var bannerHtml = (pdv.photos&&pdv.photos[0])?"<img class='bimg' src='"+pdv.photos[0]+"'>":"<span style='font-size:28px;opacity:.1'>🏪</span>";
    var brandsHtml = (pdv.brands&&pdv.brands.length)
      ?"<div class='card-brands'>"+pdv.brands.slice(0,4).map(function(b){return "<span class='btag'>"+htmlEsc(b)+"</span>";}).join('')+(pdv.brands.length>4?"<span class='btag'>+"+( pdv.brands.length-4)+"</span>":"")+"</div>":"";
    return "<div class='card"+(pdv.active?'':" off")+"' onclick='openPanel("+pdv.id+")'>"
      +"<div class='card-banner'>"+bannerHtml
      +"<div class='bu-stripe' style='background:"+color+"'></div>"
      +"<div class='card-logo'>"+logoHtml+"</div></div>"
      +"<div class='card-body'>"
      +"<div style='display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:3px'>"
      +"<div class='card-name'>"+htmlEsc(pdv.fantasia||pdv.razon)+"</div>"
      +"<span class='bu-label' style='background:rgba(0,0,0,.3);color:"+color+";border:1px solid "+color+"'>"+BU_NAMES[pdv.bu]+"</span></div>"
      +(pdv.fantasia?"<div class='card-sub'>"+htmlEsc(pdv.razon)+"</div>":"")
      +"<div class='card-addr'><span>📍</span><span>"+htmlEsc(pdv.address||'Sin dirección')+"</span></div>"
      +brandsHtml+"</div>"
      +"<div class='card-foot'><span class='sbadge "+(pdv.active?'on':'off')+"'><span class='sdot'></span>"+(pdv.active?'Activo':'Inactivo')+"</span>"
      +(pdv.vendedor?"<span class='btag' style='font-size:10px'>"+htmlEsc(pdv.vendedor)+"</span>":"")
      +(pdv.canal?"<span class='btag' style='font-size:10px;color:var(--accent);border-color:var(--accent)'>"+htmlEsc(pdv.canal)+"</span>":"")
      +"</div></div>";
  }).join('');
}

/* PANEL */
function openPanel(id) {
  editId = id; brands=[]; photos=[]; logoData=null;
  document.getElementById('panel-title').textContent = id ? 'Editar PDV' : 'Nuevo PDV';
  document.getElementById('btn-del').style.display = id ? 'block' : 'none';
  if (id) {
    var pdv = pdvs.find(function(p){return p.id===id;});
    if (!pdv) return;
    document.getElementById('f-bu').value = pdv.bu||'distrade';
    document.getElementById('f-razon').value = pdv.razon||'';
    document.getElementById('f-fantasia').value = pdv.fantasia||'';
    document.getElementById('f-addr').value = pdv.address||'';
    document.getElementById('f-lat').value = pdv.lat||'';
    document.getElementById('f-lng').value = pdv.lng||'';
    document.getElementById('f-vendedor').value = pdv.vendedor||'';
    document.getElementById('f-canal').value = pdv.canal||'';
    brands = (pdv.brands||[]).slice(); photos=(pdv.photos||[]).slice(); logoData=pdv.logoImg||null;
    document.getElementById('tog').className = 'tog'+(pdv.active?' on':'');
    document.getElementById('tog-label').textContent = pdv.active?'Activo':'Inactivo';
    document.getElementById('logo-prev').innerHTML = pdv.logoImg?"<img src='"+pdv.logoImg+"' style='width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:contain;'>":(pdv.logo||'🏪');
  } else {
    ['f-razon','f-fantasia','f-addr','f-lat','f-lng','f-vendedor','f-canal'].forEach(function(fid){document.getElementById(fid).value='';});
    document.getElementById('f-bu').value = 'distrade';
    document.getElementById('tog').className = 'tog on';
    document.getElementById('tog-label').textContent = 'Activo';
    document.getElementById('logo-prev').textContent = '🏪';
  }
  document.getElementById('geo-status').textContent='';
  renderBrands(); renderPhotos();
  document.getElementById('overlay').classList.add('open');
}

function closePanel() { document.getElementById('overlay').classList.remove('open'); editId=null; }
function overlayClick(e) { if(e.target===document.getElementById('overlay')) closePanel(); }

function toggleActive() {
  var tog=document.getElementById('tog'), on=tog.classList.contains('on');
  tog.className='tog'+(on?'':' on');
  document.getElementById('tog-label').textContent=on?'Inactivo':'Activo';
}

function savePDV() {
  var razon=document.getElementById('f-razon').value.trim();
  if (!razon) { alert('La razón social es obligatoria'); return; }
  var data = {
    bu: document.getElementById('f-bu').value,
    razon: razon,
    fantasia: document.getElementById('f-fantasia').value.trim(),
    address: document.getElementById('f-addr').value.trim(),
    lat: parseFloat(document.getElementById('f-lat').value)||null,
    lng: parseFloat(document.getElementById('f-lng').value)||null,
    brands: brands.slice(), photos: photos.slice(), logoImg: logoData,
    vendedor: document.getElementById('f-vendedor').value.trim(),
    canal: document.getElementById('f-canal').value.trim(),
    active: document.getElementById('tog').classList.contains('on')
  };
  if (editId) {
    var idx=pdvs.findIndex(function(p){return p.id===editId;});
    pdvs[idx]=Object.assign({},pdvs[idx],data);
  } else {
    data.id=Date.now(); data.logo='🏪';
    pdvs.push(data);
  }
  save(); closePanel(); renderList(); renderMarkers();
}

function deletePDV() {
  if (!editId || !confirm('¿Eliminar este PDV?')) return;
  pdvs = pdvs.filter(function(p){return p.id!==editId;});
  save(); closePanel(); renderList(); renderMarkers();
}

function addBrand(e) {
  if (e.key==='Enter'||e.key===',') {
    e.preventDefault();
    var val=e.target.value.trim().replace(/,$/,'');
    if (val&&brands.indexOf(val)<0) { brands.push(val); renderBrands(); }
    e.target.value='';
  }
}
function removeBrand(b) { brands=brands.filter(function(x){return x!==b;}); renderBrands(); }
function renderBrands() {
  var wrap=document.getElementById('brands-wrap'), inp=document.getElementById('brand-inp');
  wrap.innerHTML='';
  brands.forEach(function(b){
    var c=document.createElement('span'); c.className='bchip';
    c.innerHTML=htmlEsc(b)+' <button onclick="removeBrand(\''+b.replace(/'/g,"\\'")+"')\">✕</button>";
    wrap.appendChild(c);
  });
  wrap.appendChild(inp);
}

function handleLogo(e) {
  var f=e.target.files[0]; if(!f) return;
  var r=new FileReader(); r.onload=function(ev){
    logoData=ev.target.result;
    document.getElementById('logo-prev').innerHTML="<img src='"+logoData+"' style='width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:contain;'>";
  }; r.readAsDataURL(f);
}
function handlePhotos(e) {
  Array.from(e.target.files).forEach(function(f){
    var r=new FileReader(); r.onload=function(ev){ photos.push(ev.target.result); renderPhotos(); }; r.readAsDataURL(f);
  });
}
function removePhoto(i) { photos.splice(i,1); renderPhotos(); }
function renderPhotos() {
  var wrap=document.getElementById('photos-wrap');
  wrap.innerHTML = photos.map(function(p,i){
    return "<div class='photo-del' onclick='removePhoto("+i+")'><img class='photo-thumb' src='"+p+"'><span>✕</span></div>";
  }).join('');
}

/* GEOCODING */
function scheduleGeo() {
  clearTimeout(geoTimer);
  geoTimer = setTimeout(function(){
    var addr=document.getElementById('f-addr').value.trim();
    if (!addr) return;
    var lat=document.getElementById('f-lat').value;
    var lng=document.getElementById('f-lng').value;
    if (lat&&lng) return;
    document.getElementById('geo-status').textContent='📍 Buscando coordenadas...';
    fetch('https://nominatim.openstreetmap.org/search?q='+encodeURIComponent(addr+', Argentina')+'&format=json&limit=1')
      .then(function(r){return r.json();})
      .then(function(d){
        if (d&&d[0]) {
          document.getElementById('f-lat').value = parseFloat(d[0].lat).toFixed(6);
          document.getElementById('f-lng').value = parseFloat(d[0].lon).toFixed(6);
          document.getElementById('geo-status').textContent='✅ Coordenadas encontradas';
        } else {
          document.getElementById('geo-status').textContent='⚠️ No se encontró la dirección';
        }
      }).catch(function(){ document.getElementById('geo-status').textContent=''; });
  }, 900);
}

/* CSV PARSING */
function parseCSV(text) {
  var lines=text.trim().split(/\r?\n/); if(lines.length<2) return [];
  var headers=parseLine(lines[0]).map(function(h){return h.trim().toLowerCase();});
  return lines.slice(1).filter(function(l){return l.trim();}).map(function(l){
    var vals=parseLine(l), obj={};
    headers.forEach(function(h,i){ obj[h]=vals[i]||''; });
    return obj;
  });
}
function parseLine(l) {
  var r=[],cur='',inQ=false;
  for(var i=0;i<l.length;i++){
    var c=l[i];
    if(c==='"'){inQ=!inQ;}
    else if(c===','&&!inQ){r.push(cur);cur='';}
    else cur+=c;
  }
  r.push(cur); return r;
}

/* CORS FETCH */
function toCSVUrl(url) {
  // Already a CSV export or pub URL — return as-is
  if (url.indexOf('output=csv') > -1) return url;
  if (url.indexOf('/export?format=csv') > -1) return url;
  // /pub?gid= style
  if (url.indexOf('/pub?') > -1 || url.indexOf('/pub ') > -1) {
    return url.replace('pubhtml','pub').split('&output=')[0] + '&output=csv';
  }
  // /d/SHEETID/ style
  var m=url.match(/\/spreadsheets\/d\/([^\/]+)/);
  if (!m) return url;
  var sheetId=m[1];
  var gidM=url.match(/[?&]gid=(\d+)/);
  var gid=gidM?gidM[1]:'0';
  return 'https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/'+sheetId+'/export?format=csv&gid='+gid;
}

function fetchWithCORS(url, onStatus) {
  var csvUrl = toCSVUrl(url);
  console.log('Fetching CSV URL:', csvUrl);
  var proxies = [
    {label:'directo', prefix:null},
    {label:'proxy 1/3', prefix:'https://api.allorigins.win/raw?url='},
    {label:'proxy 2/3', prefix:'https://corsproxy.io/?'},
    {label:'proxy 3/3', prefix:'https://api.codetabs.com/v1/proxy?quest='}
  ];
  var idx=0;
  function tryNext() {
    if (idx>=proxies.length) return Promise.reject(new Error('No se pudo acceder al Sheet. Verificá que esté publicado como CSV.'));
    var p=proxies[idx++];
    if (onStatus) onStatus('Conectando ('+p.label+')...');
    var target = p.prefix ? p.prefix+encodeURIComponent(csvUrl) : csvUrl;
    return fetch(target,{cache:'no-store'})
      .then(function(r){ if(!r.ok) throw new Error('HTTP '+r.status); return r.text(); })
      .then(function(t){ if(!t||t.trim().length<5) throw new Error('vacío'); return t; })
      .catch(function(){ return tryNext(); });
  }
  return tryNext();
}

/* SHEETS IMPORT */
function fetchBU(bu) {
  var urlId = {distrade:'url-dis', farmaprix:'url-far', sportive:'url-spo'}[bu];
  var btnId = {distrade:'btn-dis', farmaprix:'btn-far', sportive:'btn-spo'}[bu];
  var prevId = {distrade:'prev-dis', farmaprix:'prev-far', sportive:'prev-spo'}[bu];
  var pcId  = {distrade:'pc-dis', farmaprix:'pc-far', sportive:'pc-spo'}[bu];
  var resId = {distrade:'result-dis', farmaprix:'result-far', sportive:'result-spo'}[bu];
  var ptId  = {distrade:'ptable-dis', farmaprix:'ptable-far', sportive:'ptable-spo'}[bu];

  var url=document.getElementById(urlId).value.trim();
  if (!url) return;
  var btn=document.getElementById(btnId);
  btn.disabled=true; btn.textContent='Cargando...';
  setSyncStatus('load','Conectando...');

  fetchWithCORS(url, function(msg){ setSyncStatus('load',msg); })
    .then(function(text){
      var rows=parseCSV(text);
      if (!rows.length) throw new Error('Sheet vacío o formato incorrecto.');

      pendingImport[bu]=rows;
      document.getElementById(pcId).textContent = rows.length+' filas';
      var color=BU_COLORS[bu];
      var html='<table><thead><tr><th>Estado</th><th>Razón Social</th><th>Dirección</th><th>Activo</th></tr></thead><tbody>';
      rows.forEach(function(r){
        var ex=pdvs.find(function(p){return p.bu===bu&&p.razon.toLowerCase()===(r.razon_social||'').toLowerCase();});
        var sc,st;
        if(!ex){sc='color:var(--green)';st='Nuevo';}
        else{var ch=ex.address!==r.direccion;sc=ch?'color:var(--accent)':'color:var(--muted)';st=ch?'Actualiza':'Sin cambios';}
        html+='<tr><td style="'+sc+';font-weight:600">'+st+'</td><td>'+htmlEsc(r.razon_social||'')+'</td><td>'+htmlEsc(r.direccion||'—')+'</td><td>'+(r.activo||'SI')+'</td></tr>';
      });
      html+='</tbody></table>';
      document.getElementById(ptId).innerHTML=html;
      document.getElementById(prevId).style.display='flex';
      document.getElementById(resId).innerHTML='';
      localStorage.setItem('url-pdv-'+bu, url);
      setSyncStatus('ok','Sheet leído ✓');
    })
    .catch(function(e){
      setSyncStatus('err','Error');
      document.getElementById(resId).innerHTML='<div class="result-err">❌ '+htmlEsc(e.message)+'</div>';
    })
    .finally(function(){ btn.disabled=false; btn.textContent='Importar'; });
}

function cancelBU(bu) {
  var prevId={distrade:'prev-dis',farmaprix:'prev-far',sportive:'prev-spo'}[bu];
  document.getElementById(prevId).style.display='none';
  delete pendingImport[bu];
}

function confirmBU(bu) {
  var rows=pendingImport[bu]; if(!rows) return;
  var prevId={distrade:'prev-dis',farmaprix:'prev-far',sportive:'prev-spo'}[bu];
  var resId={distrade:'result-dis',farmaprix:'result-far',sportive:'result-spo'}[bu];
  document.getElementById(prevId).style.display='none';
  applyRows(bu, rows).then(function(res){
    save(); renderList(); renderMarkers();
    document.getElementById(resId).innerHTML='<div class="result-ok">✅ '+res.added+' agregados, '+res.updated+' actualizados.</div>';
    delete pendingImport[bu];
    setSyncStatus('ok','Sync: '+new Date().toLocaleTimeString('es-AR'));
  });
}

/* AUTO-SYNC on load */
function autoSync() {
  var bus = ['distrade','farmaprix','sportive'];
  var idMap = {distrade:'url-dis', farmaprix:'url-far', sportive:'url-spo'};
  var toSync = bus.filter(function(bu){ return !!localStorage.getItem('url-pdv-'+bu); });
  if (!toSync.length) return;

  setSyncStatus('load', 'Sincronizando (' + toSync.length + ' BU)...');
  var done=0, errors=0;

  toSync.forEach(function(bu) {
    var url = localStorage.getItem('url-pdv-'+bu);
    document.getElementById(idMap[bu]).value = url;

    fetchWithCORS(url)
      .then(function(text) {
        var rows = parseCSV(text);
        if (!rows.length) throw new Error('vacío');
        return applyRows(bu, rows);
      })
      .then(function(res) {
        done++;
        finish(bu, res, null);
      })
      .catch(function(e) {
        errors++;
        finish(bu, null, e.message);
      });
  });

  function finish(bu, res, err) {
    var resId={distrade:'result-dis',farmaprix:'result-far',sportive:'result-spo'}[bu];
    if (err) {
      document.getElementById(resId).innerHTML='<div class="result-err">⚠️ Auto-sync fallido: '+htmlEsc(err)+'</div>';
    } else {
      document.getElementById(resId).innerHTML='<div class="result-ok">🔄 Auto-sync: '+res.added+' nuevos, '+res.updated+' actualizados.</div>';
    }
    if (done+errors === toSync.length) {
      save(); renderList(); renderMarkers();
      if (errors===0) setSyncStatus('ok','Sync automático OK · '+new Date().toLocaleTimeString('es-AR'));
      else setSyncStatus('err','Sync parcial · '+new Date().toLocaleTimeString('es-AR'));
    }
  }
}

/* Apply rows without preview (used by auto-sync and confirmBU) */
function normalizeRow(r) {
  // Build a normalized object regardless of column name casing/spacing
  var n = {};
  Object.keys(r).forEach(function(k) {
    n[k.trim().toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,'_')] = r[k];
  });
  // Map sheet columns to internal fields
  var razon = (n.razon_social || n['razon social'] || n.razon || '').trim();
  var fantasia = (n.nombre_de_fantasia || n['nombre_de_fantasia'] || n.nombre_fantasia || n.fantasia || '').trim();
  var calle = (n.sucursales || n.direccion || n.address || '').trim();
  var localidad = (n.localidad || '').trim();
  var provincia = (n.provincia || '').trim();
  var address = [calle, localidad, provincia].filter(Boolean).join(', ');
  var estadoRaw = (n.estado || n.activo || 'ACTIVO').trim().toUpperCase();
  var activo = estadoRaw !== 'INACTIVO' && estadoRaw !== 'NO' && estadoRaw !== '0';
  var vendedor = (n.vendedor || '').trim();
  var canal = (n.canal || '').trim();
  var marcas = n.marcas ? n.marcas.split('|').map(function(x){return x.trim();}) : [];
  var lat = n.lat ? parseFloat(n.lat) : null;
  var lng = n.lng ? parseFloat(n.lng) : null;
  return {razon:razon, fantasia:fantasia, address:address, activo:activo, vendedor:vendedor, canal:canal, marcas:marcas, lat:lat, lng:lng};
}

function applyRows(bu, rows) {
  return new Promise(function(resolve) {
    var added=0, updated=0;
    var queue=rows.slice();
    function next() {
      if (!queue.length) { resolve({added:added, updated:updated}); return; }
      var r=queue.shift();
      var nr=normalizeRow(r);
      var razon=nr.razon; if(!razon){next();return;}
      // Match by razon + address (since same client can have multiple branches)
      var idx=pdvs.findIndex(function(p){
        return p.bu===bu && p.razon.toLowerCase()===razon.toLowerCase() && p.address===nr.address;
      });
      if (idx>=0) {
        pdvs[idx]=Object.assign({},pdvs[idx],{
          address:nr.address||pdvs[idx].address,
          fantasia:nr.fantasia||pdvs[idx].fantasia,
          active:nr.activo,
          brands:nr.marcas.length?nr.marcas:pdvs[idx].brands,
          vendedor:nr.vendedor||pdvs[idx].vendedor||'',
          canal:nr.canal||pdvs[idx].canal||'',
          lat:nr.lat||pdvs[idx].lat,
          lng:nr.lng||pdvs[idx].lng
        });
        updated++; next();
      } else {
        var newPDV={id:Date.now()+Math.random(),bu:bu,razon:razon,fantasia:nr.fantasia,address:nr.address,lat:nr.lat,lng:nr.lng,logo:'🏪',logoImg:null,photos:[],brands:nr.marcas,active:nr.activo,vendedor:nr.vendedor,canal:nr.canal};
        if ((!nr.lat||!nr.lng)&&nr.address) {
          fetch('https://nominatim.openstreetmap.org/search?q='+encodeURIComponent(nr.address+', Argentina')+'&format=json&limit=1')
            .then(function(res){return res.json();})
            .then(function(d){if(d&&d[0]){newPDV.lat=parseFloat(d[0].lat);newPDV.lng=parseFloat(d[0].lon);}})
            .catch(function(){})
            .finally(function(){pdvs.push(newPDV);added++;next();});
        } else { pdvs.push(newPDV); added++; next(); }
      }
    }
    next();
  });
}

/* BACKUP */
function exportBackup() {
  var data = {
    version: 1,
    exported: new Date().toISOString(),
    pdvs: pdvs,
    urls: {
      distrade: localStorage.getItem('url-pdv-distrade')||'',
      farmaprix: localStorage.getItem('url-pdv-farmaprix')||'',
      sportive: localStorage.getItem('url-pdv-sportive')||''
    }
  };
  var blob = new Blob([JSON.stringify(data, null, 2)], {type:'application/json'});
  var a = document.createElement('a');
  a.href = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
  a.download = 'pdv-backup-' + new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10) + '.json';
  a.click();
  URL.revokeObjectURL(a.href);
  setSyncStatus('ok', 'Backup exportado ✓');
}

var pendingImportData = null;
function importBackup(e) {
  var file = e.target.files[0]; if (!file) return;
  var reader = new FileReader();
  reader.onload = function(ev) {
    try {
      var data = JSON.parse(ev.target.result);
      if (!data.pdvs || !Array.isArray(data.pdvs)) throw new Error('Formato inválido');
      pendingImportData = data;
      document.getElementById('import-confirm').classList.add('open');
      document.getElementById('import-confirm-btn').onclick = function() {
        pdvs = data.pdvs;
        if (data.urls) {
          if (data.urls.distrade) { localStorage.setItem('url-pdv-distrade', data.urls.distrade); document.getElementById('url-dis').value = data.urls.distrade; }
          if (data.urls.farmaprix) { localStorage.setItem('url-pdv-farmaprix', data.urls.farmaprix); document.getElementById('url-far').value = data.urls.farmaprix; }
          if (data.urls.sportive) { localStorage.setItem('url-pdv-sportive', data.urls.sportive); document.getElementById('url-spo').value = data.urls.sportive; }
        }
        save(); renderList(); renderMarkers();
        document.getElementById('import-confirm').classList.remove('open');
        setSyncStatus('ok', data.pdvs.length + ' PDVs importados ✓');
        e.target.value = '';
      };
    } catch(err) {
      alert('Error al leer el backup: ' + err.message);
    }
  };
  reader.readAsText(file);
}

/* INIT */
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
  updateStats();
  initMap();
  renderList();
  ['distrade','farmaprix','sportive'].forEach(function(bu){
    var saved=localStorage.getItem('url-pdv-'+bu);
    var idMap={distrade:'url-dis',farmaprix:'url-far',sportive:'url-spo'};
    if(saved) document.getElementById(idMap[bu]).value=saved;
  });
  // Restore Drive token if available
  var savedToken = localStorage.getItem('drive-token');
  if (savedToken) {
    driveToken = savedToken;
    setDriveUI(true);
    driveLoad();
  } else {
    autoSync();
  }
});
</script>
<!-- IMPORT CONFIRM -->
<div class="import-confirm" id="import-confirm">
  <div class="import-box">
    <h3>⚠️ Importar backup</h3>
    <p>Esto va a <strong>reemplazar todos los PDVs actuales</strong> con los del archivo. Esta acción no se puede deshacer.</p>
    <div class="import-actions">
      <button class="btn-cancel" onclick="document.getElementById('import-confirm').classList.remove('open')">Cancelar</button>
      <button class="btn-save" id="import-confirm-btn">Sí, importar</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
</body>
</html>
